name: Copy of UNBOXING
description: Unboxing variant — alternative side-angle for product reveal content.
asset_requirements: Flat lay or folded product. Side-angle unboxing variant.

input_manifest.label: Product Image
input_manifest.hint: Flat lay or folded product. Side-angle unboxing variant.

steps.prompt: Product unboxing photography, alternative angle. Side-angle view of a person opening a premium package and revealing the clothing product on a wooden table or marble surface. Natural window light, the person hands and slight torso visible, casual but styled. The clothing product is the clear hero item being revealed.

Unboxing reveal from a side angle. Person at a table opens a package, the clothing product slowly revealed and lifted out, held up and admired, slight turn to show product details. Natural light from the side, casual home setting, authentic content creator energy.
